title: Lithology identification from missing well log data: a multi-constraint guided self-supervised diffusion framework
abstract: Accurate lithology identification from well log data is fundamental for reservoir characterization, yet its practical application is often impeded by the dual challenges of incomplete well log data and scarce labeled samples. Existing data-driven methods often address these issues separately or require extensive complete labeled data, limiting their effectiveness in low-resource geological exploration scenarios. To address this compound challenge, this paper proposes a multi-constraint guided self-supervised diffusion framework, designated as MCG-SSDF, based on a generative pre-training paradigm. The framework first employs a novel multi-constraint guided diffusion model, MCG-Diff, for unsupervised pre-training on large-scale unlabeled data. This model integrates a Mamba backbone with three geological priors, namely a global structural constraint, a petrophysical correlation constraint, and a geological morphological constraint, to enhance the fidelity and physical plausibility of well log data generation and imputation. Subsequently, a parameter-efficient fine-tuning strategy is applied, where only a lightweight classification head is trained on a small set of labeled, incomplete samples, enabling the framework to perform end-to-end lithology identification directly from incomplete data during the inference stage. Systematic evaluations on two oilfield datasets validate the framework across deterministic accuracy and uncertainty quantification. Results reveal that MCG-SSDF outperforms baselines, particularly under extreme label scarcity. Ablation studies and attribution analyses further confirm the synergistic contributions and decision reliability of integrated geological constraints. This methodology provides a robust solution for high-precision lithology identification in low-resource environments.
title_cn: 缺失井测数据的岩性识别：一种多约束引导的自监督扩散框架
abstract_cn: 准确的岩性识别是储层特征描述的基础，但在实际应用中，通常受到不完整井日志数据和稀缺标记样本的双重挑战。现有的数据驱动方法通常分别解决这些问题，或者需要大量完整的标记数据，从而限制了其在低资源地质勘探场景中的有效性。为了解决这一复合挑战，本文提出了一种基于生成预训练范式的多约束引导自监督扩散框架，称为MCG-SSDF。该框架首先采用一种新颖的多约束引导扩散模型MCG-Diff，在大规模无标签数据上进行无监督预训练。该模型将Mamba主干网络与三种地质先验信息集成，包括全球结构约束、岩石物理相关性约束和地质形态约束，以增强井日志数据生成和插值的真实度和物理合理性。随后，应用了一种高效的参数微调策略，仅在一小部分标记的不完整样本上训练轻量级分类头，使得该框架能够在推断阶段直接从不完整数据中进行端到端的岩性识别。对两个油田数据集的系统评估验证了该框架在确定性准确性和不确定性量化方面的有效性。结果表明，MCG-SSDF在极端标签稀缺的情况下，表现优于基线方法。消融研究和归因分析进一步确认了集成地质约束的协同贡献和决策可靠性。这一方法为低资源环境下的高精度岩性识别提供了坚实的解决方案。

title: Evaluating how effective project planning influences construction delays by examining planning quality, resource allocation and risk mitigation strategies
abstract: Purpose This paper discusses the degree to which the project planning practices relate to construction delays, in three fundamental dimensions, namely, the planning quality, efficiency of resource allocation and the mitigation of risks associated with the project planning practices. Design/methodology/approach A total of 360 construction industry stakeholders, including project managers, site engineers, contractors, consultants and senior supervisors, participated in the study. Data were collected through a structured questionnaire and analysed using SPSS and structural equation modelling (SEM). Findings The results suggest the existence of a strong positive relationship between a high quality of planning, a better alignment of resources and the proactive development of risk mitigation practices and schedule overruns in construction projects. The findings also indicate that planning processes with well-defined scope, integration of the stakeholders and realistic scheduling are associated with predictable schedules. The allocation of resources, especially labour, materials and equipment, seems to facilitate workflow continuity, whereas risk mitigation practices are observed to help in handling the uncertainties which usually knock out the project development. Research limitations/implications Despite its contributions, the study is limited by its cross-sectional design and reliance on self-reported data, which may restrict causal inference and generalizability across different project types and geographical contexts. Practical implications The paper has also gone deeper into proper project planning as a method of minimizing delay in construction. Originality/value This study integrates advanced planning tools with empirical analysis to highlight the combined influence of planning quality, resource management and technological moderation on construction project outcomes.
title_cn: 评估项目规划的有效性如何影响施工延误，重点分析规划质量、资源配置和风险缓解策略。
abstract_cn: 目的 本文讨论项目规划实践与建设延误之间的关系，重点从三个基本维度进行分析，即规划质量、资源配置效率以及与项目规划实践相关的风险缓解。 设计/方法论/途径 本研究共邀请360名建筑行业参与者，包括项目经理、现场工程师、承包商、顾问和高级监督员参与。数据通过结构化问卷收集，并使用SPSS和结构方程模型（SEM）进行分析。 发现 结果表明，高质量的规划、资源的良好对接以及主动的风险缓解实践与建设项目的进度超支之间存在显著的正相关关系。研究结果还指出，具有明确范围、整合利益相关者以及现实可行的进度安排的规划过程与可预测的进度安排相关联。资源配置，特别是人力、材料和设备的配置，似乎有助于工作流程的连续性，而风险缓解实践则有助于应对通常会影响项目发展的不确定性。 研究限制/启示 尽管本研究具有贡献，但其横断面设计和对自我报告数据的依赖限制了因果推断的能力，并可能影响研究结果的普遍适用性，尤其是在不同项目类型和地理背景下。 实践启示 本文进一步探讨了合理的项目规划作为减少建设延误的一种方法。 原创性/价值 本研究结合先进的规划工具与实证分析，强调了规划质量、资源管理与技术调节对建设项目结果的综合影响。

title: Collaborative strategies of multiple subjects on “zero-waste construction site” – an evolutionary game analysis
abstract: Purpose The promotion of “Zero-Waste Construction Sites” (ZWCS) is caught in a dilemma between insufficient effectiveness of unilateral government governance and a lack of initiative from enterprises to participate. Accordingly, this study aims to explore how to enhance construction enterprises' enthusiasm for building ZWCS through government incentive strategies and the involvement of industry associations, as well as how to effectively integrate the government's guiding role with the coordinating role of industry associations. Design/methodology/approach This study constructs an evolutionary game model and conducts simulation experiments to systematically analyze the strategic interactions among multiple stakeholders in the construction of ZWCS. It specifically examines the decision-making behaviors and evolutionary dynamics of the three core interest entities: the government, industry associations, and construction enterprises. Findings The study shows that the government plays a leading role in the incubation stage of ZWCS, and appropriate subsidies and penalties can dynamically adapt to the development of ZWCS at each stage, while high incremental costs inhibit the motivation of construction enterprises to build ZWCS. The participation of industry associations can transfer the regulatory functions of the government, save the cost of ZWCS, and help to stimulate the participation of all parties. Originality/value This study develops an effective governance framework for ZWCS, centered on government guidance, association coordination, and enterprise participation, by deciphering the underlying collaborative mechanisms among these three stakeholders. This approach offers a promising pathway to support the “Zero Waste City” initiative and contribute to high-quality development within the construction industry.
title_cn: “零废弃建筑工地”的多主体协作策略——进化博弈分析
abstract_cn: 目的 “零废弃施工现场”（ZWCS）的推广面临政府单方面治理效果不足与企业参与主动性缺乏之间的困境。因此，本研究旨在探讨如何通过政府激励策略和行业协会的参与，增强建筑企业对建设ZWCS的积极性，以及如何有效整合政府的引导角色与行业协会的协调角色。 设计/方法论/途径 本研究构建了一个演化博弈模型，并进行了模拟实验，以系统分析多个利益相关者在建筑ZWCS中的战略互动。具体考察了政府、行业协会和建筑企业这三个核心利益实体的决策行为和演变动态。 研究结果 研究表明，政府在ZWCS的孵化阶段发挥主导作用，适当的补贴与惩罚可以动态适应ZWCS在各个阶段的发展，而高额的增量成本抑制了建筑企业建设ZWCS的动力。行业协会的参与能够转移政府的监管职能，节省ZWCS的成本，并有助于激发各方的参与积极性。 独创性/价值 本研究通过破解这三方利益相关者之间的合作机制，发展了以政府引导、协会协调和企业参与为中心的ZWCS有效治理框架。这种方法为支持“零废弃城市”倡议提供了有前景的路径，并为建筑行业的高质量发展做出贡献。

title: Coconut shell waste based activated carbon as a scaffolding of biobased phase change material for enhanced thermal energy storage: Sustainable waste recycling for renewable energy source
abstract: The utilization of cleaner products in the energy sector to promote renewable energy is essential for achieving sustainable development goals. This research investigates the formulation of a biobased phase change material (PCM) composed of a eutectic mixture of capric acid (CA) and myristic acid (MA), using activated carbon derived from waste coconut shells (AC cs ) as a porous scaffold. The main goal of this investigation is twofold: (a) to obtain a biobased PCM with enhanced thermal conductivity and leakage resistance, and (b) to contribute to minimizing the significant environmental burden and waste management concern associated with coconut shell waste. It is shown that the developed composite has the following properties. FTIR and XRD analyses confirm that PCM is physically incorporated within the AC cs matrix without chemical interaction. Meanwhile, SEM reveals a homogeneous impregnation of the PCM within the activated carbon porous structure. A DSC analysis yields a melting enthalpy of 32.5 J/g and a phase transition temperature of 21.8 °C for the composite with the ratio of AC cs to PCM equal to 80 wt%. A TGA analysis further demonstrates the thermal stability of the composite up to 155 °C. The thermal conductivity of AC cs , eutectic PCM (EPCM) and proposed composite PCM (AC cs /EPCM) were determined to be 0.49, 0.17 and 0.30 W/mK, respectively. Thus, the incorporation of the EPCM into the AC cs leads to a 43% enhancement in thermal conductivity. Further, the melting time for EPCM and AC cs /EPCM was determined to be 648 sec and 417 sec, respectively, showing a 35% reduction in time for the proposed composite. After 1000 thermal cycles, the reduction in the latent heat of the composite is marginal, implying its good thermal reliability. These results establish the proposed AC cs /EPCM as a sustainable thermal energy storage material with potential applications in passive temperature regulation for the building sector. • Coconut shell waste recycled for renewable energy source to promote sustainability • Novel Biobased PCM composite with good thermal conductivity and leakage resistance • Coconut Shell based activated Carbon scaffold improves PCM thermal stability. • 43% increase in thermal conductivity via composite PCM incorporation. • Minimal latent heat loss after 1000 thermal cycles ensures reliability. • Sustainable PCM composite suitable for passive building temperature control.
title_cn: 以椰壳废弃物为基础的活性炭作为生物基相变材料的支架，以增强热能储存：可持续废物回收用于可再生能源源
abstract_cn: 在能源领域利用清洁产品以推动可再生能源，对于实现可持续发展目标至关重要。本研究探讨了一种生物基相变材料（PCM）的配方，该材料由癸酸（CA）和肉豆蔻酸（MA）的共晶混合物组成，使用源自废椰壳的活性碳（AC_cs）作为多孔支架。本研究的主要目标有两个：（a）获得具有增强热导率和泄漏阻力的生物基PCM；（b）有助于减少与椰壳废物相关的重大环境负担和废物管理问题。研究表明，所开发的复合材料具有以下特性。FTIR和XRD分析证实，PCM物理上嵌入AC_cs基体中，且没有化学相互作用。同时，SEM揭示了PCM在活性碳多孔结构中的均匀浸渍。DSC分析表明，对于AC_cs与PCM质量比为80 wt%的复合材料，其熔化焓为32.5 J/g，相变温度为21.8 °C。TGA分析进一步表明，该复合材料在155 °C下具有良好的热稳定性。AC_cs、共晶PCM（EPCM）和所提复合PCM（AC_cs/EPCM）的热导率分别为0.49、0.17和0.30 W/mK。因此，将EPCM融入AC_cs中可使热导率提升43%。此外，EPCM和AC_cs/EPCM的熔化时间分别为648秒和417秒，表明所提出的复合材料的熔化时间减少了35%。经过1000个热循环后，复合材料的潜热损耗很小，表明其良好的热可靠性。这些结果确立了所提的AC_cs/EPCM作为一种可持续的热能储存材料，具有在建筑领域被动温度调节的潜在应用。• 利用废椰壳再生为可再生能源源以促进可持续性 • 新型生物基PCM复合材料具有良好的热导率和泄漏阻力 • 基于椰壳的活性碳支架提高了PCM的热稳定性 • 通过复合PCM的引入，热导率提高了43% • 经过1000个热循环后，潜热损失极小，确保了可靠性 • 适用于被动建筑温控的可持续PCM复合材料。

title: Influence of additives and alternative precursors on the properties of lime-activated slag systems
abstract: Lime-activated slag binders offer a low-carbon alternative to Portland cement but remain highly sensitive to precursor chemistry and additive strategy, especially when alternative or waste-derived materials are incorporated. This study investigates the combined effects of synthetic calcium silicate hydrate (C–S–H) seeding and colloidal nano silica on lime-activated slag systems containing bone ash and metakaolin as alternative precursors. Sixteen mixtures were evaluated using a constant water-to-precursor ratio and lime dosage to isolate chemical and microstructural effects. Mechanical performance was assessed through compressive and split tensile strength, while durability-related behaviour was examined using water absorption and porosity measurements. Microstructural evolution and chemical composition were analyzed through scanning electron microscopy and energy dispersive spectroscopy, including elemental mapping and atomic ratio analysis. The results from this study showed that compressive strength is governed primarily by localized densification of reaction products, with nano silica and C–S–H seeding significantly enhancing strength in slag-rich systems. However, these improvements do not always translate into improved tensile resistance or reduced transport properties. Mixtures incorporating bone ash and metakaolin exhibit pronounced strength–durability decoupling, characterized by high compressive strength alongside elevated porosity and water absorption. EDS analysis reveals that this behaviour arises from chemically competitive environments in which calcium is partitioned among silicate, aluminate, and phosphate domains, limiting the formation of a chemically continuous binding network. • Lime-activated slag was modified using nano additives and alternative precursors • Bone ash and metakaolin introduce calcium competition and network disruption • Strength, porosity and absorption were linked to microstructure and composition • EDS maps reveal that calcium partitioning governs strength–durability decoupling. • Tensile strength and transport depend on microstructural continuity
topics: Recycling and utilization of industrial and municipal waste in materials production
title_cn: 添加剂和替代前驱体对石灰激活矿渣体系特性的影响
abstract_cn: 石灰活化炉渣粘结剂为波特兰水泥提供了一种低碳替代品，但对前驱体的化学性质和添加剂策略仍高度敏感，尤其是在引入替代或废弃材料时。本研究探讨了合成硅酸钙水合物（C–S–H）种子和胶态纳米二氧化硅对含骨灰和煅化高岭土作为替代前驱体的石灰活化炉渣系统的综合影响。通过使用恒定的水与前驱体比和石灰用量，共评估了十六种混合物，以隔离化学和微观结构效应。机械性能通过抗压强度和劈裂抗拉强度进行评估，而耐久性相关行为则通过水吸收和孔隙率测量进行检验。通过扫描电子显微镜和能量色散光谱，包括元素映射和原子比分析，对微观结构演变和化学成分进行了分析。本研究的结果表明，抗压强度主要由反应产物的局部致密化主导，纳米二氧化硅和C–S–H种子显著增强了富含炉渣系统的强度。然而，这些改进并不总能转化为更好的抗拉强度或降低的运输特性。掺入骨灰和煅化高岭土的混合物表现出明显的强度-耐久性解耦，特征是高抗压强度同时伴随较高的孔隙率和水吸收。能量色散光谱分析表明，这种行为源于化学竞争环境，其中钙在硅酸盐、铝酸盐和磷酸盐领域之间分配，限制了化学连续绑定网络的形成。 • 石灰活化炉渣通过纳米添加剂和替代前驱体进行了改性 • 骨灰和煅化高岭土引入了钙的竞争和网络破坏 • 强度、孔隙率和吸水性与微观结构和成分相关 • EDS图谱揭示钙的分配主导了强度-耐久性解耦 • 抗拉强度和运输性能依赖于微观结构的连续性。

title: Spectral acceleration-based design methodology of tuned viscous mass damper-integrated frame structures
title_cn: 基于谱加速度的调谐粘性质量阻尼器集成框架结构设计方法论

title: Fibre-polymer composites for structural assembly and disassembly towards reuse: Review and reassessment
abstract: The properties of light weight and corrosion resistance of fibre-polymer composites suggest them for design intentions of structural assembly and disassembly and further reuse. Although research in this regard remains limited, this paper reviews large-scale structural applications of fibre-polymer composites with consideration of these design intentions. It further reassesses several structural assembles with experimental demonstration and practice of their disassembly. In particular, for web-flange sandwich and composite beam structures, through bolts or one-sided bolts were used as the shear connections to achieve their dismantlability after the structures were loaded or failures were initiated. A steel sleeve connector was introduced to form beam-column and column-column assemblies through bolted connections. Their dismantlability was evidenced for such structural assemblies using composites of hollow sections, after ultimate failures. The sleeve connectors were further used to assemble large-scale space frame structures made of fibre-polymer composites. Dismantlability was shown after static and fatigue experiments, and it was able to disassemble the structure and reuse its components to form new structures. Available results on off-torque of bolted joints after various environmental exposures were further summarised, and future research needs were suggested for disassembly and reuse of composite structures after long-term service. • Overview on design for disassembly and reuse for various structural forms • Focused review on large-scale structural disassembly and reuse for composites • Reassessment of experimental results for disassembly of composite structures • Demonstration of disassembly for developed composite structures after loading • Summary of off-torque of bolted joints after environmental exposure in this context
title_cn: 用于结构组装和拆卸以便重复使用的纤维聚合物复合材料：回顾与重新评估
abstract_cn: 轻质和耐腐蚀的纤维聚合物复合材料的特性使其适合用于结构的组装与拆卸设计，以及进一步的重复使用。尽管在这一方面的研究仍然有限，本文回顾了纤维聚合物复合材料在大规模结构应用中的设计意图。它进一步重新评估了若干结构组装的实验示范及其拆卸实践。特别是对于网腹-法兰三明治和复合梁结构，通过使用贯通螺栓或单侧螺栓作为剪切连接，以实现这些结构在加载或故障发生后的可拆卸性。引入了钢套筒连接器，通过螺栓连接形成梁-柱和柱-柱的组装。对于这种使用空心截面的结构组装，其可拆卸性在极限失效后得到了证实。套筒连接器进一步用于组装大型空间框架结构，这些结构是由纤维聚合物复合材料制成的。经过静态和疲劳实验后显示了可拆卸性，能够拆卸结构并重复使用其组件形成新结构。还总结了各种环境暴露后螺栓连接的卸矩的现有结果，并对长期使用后复合结构的拆卸和重复使用提出了未来研究需求。• 针对各类结构形式的拆卸与重复使用设计概述 • 专注于复合材料的大规模结构拆卸与重复使用的回顾 • 对复合结构拆卸实验结果的重新评估 • 加载后开发的复合结构拆卸的示范 • 在此背景下，环境暴露后螺栓连接的卸矩总结

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Autonomous UAV Navigation for Close-Range Image Acquisition of Scaffold Joints
abstract: Scaffold joints are critical structural elements that require continuous inspection. However, their small size and wide distribution make manual inspection inefficient. To address this challenge, this paper proposes an autonomous uncrewed aerial vehicle (UAV)-based method to efficiently capture close-range images of joints for inspection. The first module generates a real-time three-dimensional (3D) point cloud map using LiDAR and simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) and converts it into a bird’s-eye view (BEV) image to provide spatial context. The second module plans scanning paths based on these data and performs three functions: (1) detecting scaffolds in the BEV image using a deep learning model and segments them into scan units; (2) evaluating scan feasibility based on UAV accessibility and obstacles; and (3) prioritizing and selecting the next target based on path efficiency and generates a collision-free trajectory. Experimental results at two outdoor construction sites demonstrated that the proposed method captured close-range images of all joints via autonomous flight, achieving 100% (207 joints) coverage. This study proposes a novel UAV-based method for autonomous close-range scanning of scaffolds, enabling precise monitoring of detailed components such as joints.
topics: Innovations in Concrete and Construction Materials
title_cn: 自主无人机导航用于近距离图像采集的脚手架接头
abstract_cn: 脚手架接头是需要持续检查的关键结构元素。然而，由于其体积小且分布广泛，手动检查效率低下。为了解决这一挑战，本文提出了一种基于无人机的自主方法，以高效捕捉接头的近距离图像进行检查。第一个模块利用激光雷达（LiDAR）和同步定位与地图构建（SLAM）生成实时三维（3D）点云地图，并将其转换为鸟瞰图（BEV）图像，以提供空间上下文。第二个模块基于这些数据规划扫描路径，并执行三项功能：（1）使用深度学习模型在鸟瞰图中检测脚手架，并将其划分为扫描单元；（2）根据无人机的可达性和障碍物评估扫描的可行性；（3）根据路径效率优先选择下一个目标，并生成无碰撞轨迹。在两个户外施工现场的实验结果表明，该方法通过自主飞行捕捉到了所有接头的近距离图像，达成了100%（207个接头）的覆盖。该研究提出了一种新颖的基于无人机的脚手架自主近距离扫描方法，实现了对接头等细节组件的精准监测。

title: Holding the egg: ethical tensions of care in safety-critical technologies
abstract: • Conceptualising ethical care after deployment in safety–critical systems. • CARE-TECH framework reveals tensions in sustaining safety over time. • Responsibility persists despite declining steerability and exit options. • Long-lived technologies generate cumulative ethical burdens in practice. • Framework supports empirical research on post-deployment responsibility. Safety-critical technologies frequently persist for decades, outliving their original design assumptions, organisational arrangements, and regulatory contexts. Yet ethical and safety scholarship remains predominantly oriented toward early lifecycle phases, emphasising design assurance, deployment decisions, and prevention, while offering limited conceptual resources for understanding responsibility once systems are already in operation, ageing, and increasingly difficult to modify or withdraw. This paper develops a conceptual account of ethical care after deployment, referring to forms of responsibility that persist once safety–critical technologies become operationally embedded and remain in use while practical steerability, authority, epistemic certainty, and exit options gradually erode. The animated film Angel’s Egg (Oshii, 1985) is used as a heuristic device—not as empirical evidence or film analysis—to surface ethical tensions associated with sustaining fragile systems over time. On this basis, the paper proposes a preliminary conceptual framework for examining ethical conditions that remain weakly captured by prevailing safety concepts. The resulting CARE-TECH framework identifies six interrelated tensions: care without repair, responsibility without authority, care under epistemic uncertainty, fragility without exit, inherited burden, and irreversibility of ethical failure. The framework further clarifies how these tensions cluster as limits of agency and temporal–epistemic burdens, sustained by structural conditions of persistence and shaped by an ethical horizon of irreversibility. The contribution is intentionally conceptual, offering a vocabulary to recognise and analyse the accumulation and distribution of ethical burden across the operational life of safety–critical technologies, and outlining directions for empirical engagement in domains where long-lived systems must be sustained under constraint.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 握住蛋：安全关键技术中护理的伦理紧张关系
abstract_cn:
• 在安全关键系统部署后构建伦理关怀的概念。  
• CARE-TECH框架揭示了在时间维度上维持安全的张力。  
• 尽管可控性和退出选项逐渐减少，责任依然存在。  
• 长寿命技术在实践中产生累积的伦理负担。  
• 该框架支持对部署后责任的实证研究。  

安全关键技术常常存在数十年，超越其原始设计假设、组织安排和监管环境。然而，伦理和安全理论的研究仍主要集中于生命周期的早期阶段，强调设计保证、部署决策和预防，同时对理解系统在运行后、老化及日益难以修改或撤回时的责任提供的概念资源有限。本文发展了一种关于部署后伦理关怀的概念性描述，提及一旦安全关键技术运行嵌入并继续使用时，责任的形式在实用可控性、权威性、知识确定性和退出选项逐渐削弱的情况下仍然存在。动画电影《天使的蛋》（押井守，1985）被用作启发性工具——而非实证证据或电影分析——以揭示在时间维度上维持脆弱系统所面临的伦理张力。在此基础上，本文提出了一种初步概念框架，旨在考察当前安全概念尚未充分捕捉到的伦理条件。由此产生的CARE-TECH框架识别了六种相互关联的张力：无修复的关怀、无权威的责任、在认知不确定性下的关怀、无退出的脆弱性、继承负担和伦理失败的不可逆性。该框架进一步澄清了这些张力如何作为代理能力的限制和时间-知识负担聚集，这种状况受制于持续性的结构条件，并受不可逆伦理视域的影响。该贡献故意为概念性，提供了一套词汇，以识别和分析在安全关键技术的运营生命周期内伦理负担的积累和分配，并概述了在需要在制约条件下维持长寿命系统的领域中进行实证研究的方向。

title_cn: 气候变化与职业健康：意大利对热应激的认知与知识

title: A method based on double-weighted closeness centrality for identifying firefighting strategies in industrial plants considering domino effects
abstract: • Domino effects are modeled as double-weighted directed graphs. • New relationships are developed for ‘distance’ and ‘closeness centrality’ • Firefighting strategies are identified by minimizing the closeness of burning units. • The method is easy to implement as it is independent of fire spread probabilities. Firefighting at process plants is considered the last line of defence in fire protection. As such, the success and efficiency of firefighting strategies directly impact the safety, integrity, and damage cost of process plants and adjacent on-site and off-site structures and facilities. Suppressing burning units while cooling exposed units is the most intuitive strategy, which is also practiced at process plants, for preventing fire spread and potential domino effects, assuming that firefighting resources (equipment, crew, water, etc.) are sufficient to deal with all the burning and exposed units. However, when firefighting resources are insufficient, models are required to help firefighters identify the most critical units and prioritize viable firefighting strategies accordingly. In the present study, after modelling domino effects as a double-weighted directed graph, i.e., a graph with weighted nodes and edges, it is shown that effective firefighting strategies can be identified by minimizing the closeness centrality of burning units. The developed method not only results in consistent firefighting strategies compared with the risk-based methods in the literature, but also requires fewer input parameters (basically, heat flux and asset monetary values), alleviating the need for calculating the fire escalation probabilities.
title_cn: 一种基于双权重接近中心性的方法，用于识别工业厂房中考虑多米诺效应的灭火策略
abstract_cn:
• 多米诺效应被建模为双权重有向图。  
• 新的关系被提出以描述“距离”和“接近中心性”。  
• 通过最小化燃烧单元的接近性确定灭火策略。  
• 该方法易于实施，因为它不依赖于火灾蔓延概率。  

在过程工业中，灭火被视为火灾防护的最后防线。因此，灭火策略的成功与效率直接影响到过程设施及其附近现场和非现场结构的安全性、完整性和损失成本。在假设灭火资源（设备、人员、水等）充足的情况下，抑制燃烧单元并冷却暴露单元是最直观的策略，在过程工业中也得到了应用，以防止火灾蔓延和潜在的多米诺效应。然而，当灭火资源不足时，需要模型来帮助灭火人员识别最关键的单元，并相应优先考虑可行的灭火策略。在本研究中，在将多米诺效应建模为一个双权重有向图（即具有加权节点和边的图）后，显示通过最小化燃烧单元的接近中心性可以识别有效的灭火策略。所开发的方法不仅与文献中的基于风险的方法相比，产生了一致的灭火策略，而且所需输入参数更少（基本上是热通量和资产货币价值），减轻了计算火灾蔓延概率的需要。
